dashboard.noRecentGroupActivity: No recent user submissions in your groups yet.

dashboardState.errorDescription: Failed to load. Please try again.

problems.title: Problems
problems.submitConfirmDescription: Your current editor contents will be sent to the judge. You can come back and resubmit after reviewing the result.
problems.sourceFileLoadFailed: Failed to read the selected source file.
problems.editDescription: Edit problem details and test cases.
problems.problemTypeAutoHint: Submissions are automatically judged against test cases.
problems.problemTypeManualHint: Submissions are stored without automatic judging. Suitable for descriptive or essay-type problems.
problems.deleteDialogDescription: "{title}" will be permanently removed only if it has no submissions and no assignment links.
problems.deleteHelpText: Deletion is permanent and only allowed while this problem has no submissions and no assignment links.
problems.deleteBlocked: This problem cannot be deleted because it still has {submissions} submission(s) and {assignments} assignment link(s).
problems.forceDeleteDescription: "{title}" has {submissions} submission(s) and {assignments} assignment link(s). Force deleting will permanently remove all related submissions and assignment links.
problems.titleTooLong: Title must be 200 characters or less
problems.descriptionTooLong: Description must be 50,000 characters or less
problems.invalidTimeLimit: Time limit must be between 100 and 10,000 milliseconds
problems.invalidMemoryLimit: Memory limit must be between 16 and 1,024 MB
problems.zipImportNoPairs: No valid input/output pairs found in ZIP. Use numbered files like 01.in, 01.out.
problems.noTestCases: No test cases yet. Add at least one to make the problem judgeable.
problems.testCaseFileLoadFailed: Failed to read the selected test case file.
problems.testCaseInputRequired: Each test case needs an input
problems.testCaseOutputRequired: Each test case needs an expected output
problems.tooManyTestCases: You can add up to 100 test cases per problem
problems.testCasesLocked: Test cases cannot be changed after submissions exist for this problem
problems.testCasesLockedNotice: Test cases are locked because this problem already has submissions. You can still edit the statement and limits.
problems.testCasesUnlockWarning: Admin override is enabled. Changing test cases can invalidate earlier submission results.
problems.showDetailedResults: Show test case results to users
problems.showRuntimeErrors: Show runtime error details to users
problems.defaultLanguageHint: Pre-selected language for this problem. Overrides the site default. Leave empty to use site default.

submissionErrors.unauthorized: Please sign in again and retry your submission.
submissionErrors.forbidden: You do not have permission to submit to this problem.
submissionErrors.problemRequired: Problem information is missing. Refresh the page and try again.
submissionErrors.problemNotFound: This problem could not be found.
submissionErrors.assignmentContextRequired: Open this problem from the assignment page so your progress is recorded correctly.
submissionErrors.assignmentNotFound: This assignment could not be found.
submissionErrors.assignmentNotStarted: This assignment is not open for submissions yet.
submissionErrors.assignmentEnrollmentRequired: You must be enrolled in this assignment's group to submit.
submissionErrors.assignmentProblemMismatch: This problem is not part of the selected assignment.
submissionErrors.languageNotSupported: This language is not currently available for submissions.
submissionErrors.sourceCodeTooLarge: Your source code exceeds the allowed size limit.
submissionErrors.submissionRateLimited: You are submitting too quickly. Please wait a moment before trying again.
submissionErrors.tooManyPendingSubmissions: You already have too many submissions waiting to be judged. Please wait for them to finish.
submissionErrors.judgeQueueFull: The judge queue is currently full. Please try again in a few minutes.
submissionErrors.examNotStarted: You must start the exam before submitting.

problems.assignmentSelectionDescription: This problem is part of an assignment. Open it from the assignment page to submit.
problems.assignmentSelectionSubmitHint: Choose one of the assignments above to submit this problem with the correct assignment context.
problems.sequenceNumberHint: Fixed display number for this problem. Leave empty for auto-numbering.
problems.difficultyHint: Difficulty from 0 to 10. Leave empty for unrated.
problems.tagsHint: Press Enter or comma to add a tag. Max 20 tags.
problems.allowAiAssistantRestricted: AI assistance is forced off in the current platform mode.

problemSets.title: Problem Sets
problemSets.createDescription: Create a new set of problems.
problemSets.editDescription: Update the problem set name, description, and linked problems.
problemSets.problemsDescription: Select problems to include in this set.
problemSets.groupsDescription: Groups that have access to the problems in this set.
problemSets.removeGroupConfirm: Remove this group from the problem set?
problemSets.removeGroupConfirmDescription: Users in "{group}" will lose access to problems that are only available through this problem set.
problemSets.deleteDialogDescription: "{name}" will be permanently removed. Problems themselves will not be deleted.
problemSets.problemSetNameTooLong: Name must be 200 characters or less
problemSets.problemSetDescriptionTooLong: Description must be 2,000 characters or less
problemSets.problemSetProblemDuplicate: Each problem can only be added once
problemSets.tooManyProblemSetProblems: You can add up to 200 problems to a set

submissions.title: My Submissions
submissions.noSubmissions: You haven't made any submissions yet.
submissions.searchPlaceholder: Search by problem title or user name...
submissions.compileOutputHidden: Compile error details are not available for this submission.
submissions.detailedResultsHidden: Detailed test case results are not available for this submission.
submissions.sourceHidden: The source code is only visible to the author of this submission.
submissions.noOtherSubmissions: No other submissions for this problem.

groups.title: Groups
groups.createDialogDescription: Create a new group for your affiliation.
groups.nameTooLong: Group name must be 100 characters or less
groups.descriptionTooLong: Description must be 500 characters or less
groups.noGroups: You are not enrolled in any groups.
groups.noMembers: No users are enrolled in this group yet.
groups.availableStudentsEmpty: All active users are already enrolled in this group.
groups.removeMemberDialogTitle: Remove this member from the group?
groups.removeMemberDialogDescription: {name} will lose access to this group and its assignments.
groups.bulkAddNoneSelected: Select at least one user to enroll.
groups.studentNotFound: The selected user could not be found.
groups.studentInactive: This user account is inactive and cannot be enrolled.
groups.studentRoleInvalid: Only active user accounts can be enrolled in a group.
groups.studentAlreadyEnrolled: This user is already enrolled in the group.
groups.noGroupInstructors: No co-instructors or TAs assigned to this group yet.
groups.name: Name
groups.groupMemberRemovalBlocked: This member cannot be removed because they already have assignment submissions in this group.
groups.archiveConfirmDescription: Archiving "{name}" will mark it as inactive. Members will retain access to view their submissions, but no new submissions will be expected. You can unarchive it later.
groups.unarchiveConfirmDescription: Unarchiving "{name}" will mark it as active again.
groups.assignmentCreateDialogDescription: Add a new assignment with problems and deadlines.
groups.assignmentEditDialogDescription: Update the assignment details and linked problems.
groups.assignmentDeleteBlocked: This assignment cannot be deleted because it already has {submissions} submission(s).
groups.assignmentDeleteDialogDescription: "{title}" will be permanently removed only if it has no assignment-linked submissions.
groups.assignmentProblemsDescription: Select problems and set point values.
groups.assignmentProblemsLocked: Problems are locked because submissions already exist. You can still edit other settings.
groups.contestProblemsLockedDuringActive: Cannot change problems while an exam-mode contest is active.
groups.problemNotInAssignment: The specified problem does not belong to this assignment.
groups.overrideScoreExceedsMax: Override score cannot exceed the problem's maximum points.
groups.assignmentProblemsUnlockWarning: Changing problems after submissions exist may invalidate past grades.
groups.assignmentProblemRequired: Add at least one problem to the assignment.
groups.assignmentProblemDuplicate: Each assignment problem can only be added once.
groups.assignmentProblemForbidden: One or more selected problems are not available for this group.
groups.assignmentTitleTooLong: Assignment title must be 200 characters or less.
groups.assignmentDescriptionTooLong: Assignment description must be 5,000 characters or less.
groups.assignmentLatePenaltyInvalid: Late penalty must be between 0 and 100.
groups.assignmentScheduleInvalid: The start time must be before the deadline.
groups.assignmentLateDeadlineInvalid: The late deadline must be on or after the deadline.
groups.examModeDescription_scheduled: Fixed start/end time. All users take the exam simultaneously.
groups.examModeDescription_windowed: Personal timer. Each user starts their own countdown.
groups.examDurationDescription: How many minutes each user has once they start.
groups.examDurationRequired: Exam duration is required for windowed mode.
groups.examWindowRequired: Windowed mode requires both a start time and deadline.
groups.examScheduleRequired: Scheduled mode requires both a start time and deadline.

replay.title: Contest replay
replay.description: Scrub through the leaderboard as submissions changed the standings over time.
replay.noData: No replay data is available yet.

groups.scoringModelDescription_ioi: Partial credit by test cases passed. Best score kept.
groups.scoringModelDescription_icpc: Problems are either fully accepted or rejected. Ranking by problems solved, then penalty time.
groups.freezeLeaderboardDescription: Users see frozen standings after this time. Instructors see live data.
groups.enableAntiCheatDescription: Logs browser focus changes, copy/paste, and similar signals as review aids. This is low-confidence telemetry, not proctoring or proof of misconduct. For formal exams, add separate operational controls.
groups.showResultsToCandidateDescription: When enabled, participants can see their grading details including test case results. When disabled, only instructors and admins can view results.
groups.hideScoresFromCandidatesDescription: When enabled, participants cannot see their numerical scores.
groups.examStartConfirmDescription: You will have {duration} minutes to complete this exam. The timer cannot be paused or restarted once started.
groups.examModeChangeBlocked: Cannot change exam mode because users have already started their exams.
groups.examTimingChangeBlocked: Cannot change exam timing because users have already started their exams.
groups.tooManyAssignmentProblems: You can add up to 100 problems to an assignment.
groups.noAssignmentProblems: No problems linked yet. Add at least one problem to create the assignment.

assignmentDetail.noFilteredStudents: No users match the current filters.
assignmentDetail.studentSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, username, or affiliation

groups.assignmentVisibilityDescription_private: Visible only to enrolled participants and staff. Guests cannot browse it from the public contest catalog.
groups.assignmentVisibilityDescription_public: Visible in the public contest catalog. Joining and starting still require authentication.

users.title: User Management
users.deactivateDialogDescription: @{username} will keep their data, but they will lose access to protected areas on their next request.
users.restoreDialogDescription: @{username} will be able to sign in and use protected areas again.
users.autoGeneratedPasswordNotice: A one-time password will be generated when you create this user.
users.generatedPasswordDescription: This password is shown only once. Copy it now and share it securely with the user.
users.generatedPasswordWarning: Once you close this dialog, you will not be able to see this password again.
users.generatedPasswordCopyFailed: Failed to copy the generated password
users.newPasswordHint: Leave blank to keep the current password.
users.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action
users.cannotDeactivateSelf: You cannot deactivate your own account
users.cannotDeactivateSuperAdmin: The super admin account cannot be deactivated
users.onlySuperAdminCanChangeSuperAdminRole: Only a super admin can change the super admin role
users.cannotChangeSuperAdminRole: The super admin role cannot be changed
users.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
users.passwordTooLong: Password must be 128 characters or less
users.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
users.bulkCsvEmpty: CSV file is empty or has no data rows.
users.bulkCsvHint: Required columns: username, name, password. Optional: email, role, affiliation. Max 200 rows.
users.deleteDialogDescription: @{username} and all their submissions, enrollments, and comments will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
users.cannotDeleteSuperAdmin: The super admin account cannot be deleted
users.cannotDeleteSelf: You cannot delete your own account
users.deleteUserFailed: Failed to delete user. Please try again.

submissions.title: All Submissions
submissions.searchPlaceholder: Search by user name or problem title...

loginLogs.title: Login Logs
loginLogs.noEvents: No login events matched the current filters.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Identifier, user, IP, or user agent

auditLogs.title: Audit Logs
auditLogs.noEvents: No audit events matched the current filters.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.siteTitleHint: Leave blank to use the localized default. Current effective title: {current}
settings.siteDescriptionHint: Leave blank to use the localized default. Current effective description: {current}
settings.siteIconUrlHint: URL of the site icon displayed in the sidebar header. Leave blank to use the default icon.
settings.timeZoneHint: Leave blank to use the default application timezone. Current effective timezone: {current}
settings.aiAssistantEnabledHint: When disabled, the AI assistant is hidden on all problems regardless of per-problem settings.
settings.defaultLanguageHint: Language pre-selected when users open problems (e.g. python, cpp). Leave empty to default to C.
settings.defaultLocaleHint: Fallback language when the user has no locale preference (cookie or browser settings). Select 'Auto-detect' to use the browser language.
settings.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
settings.siteTitleTooLong: Site title must be 100 characters or less
settings.siteDescriptionTooLong: Site description must be 255 characters or less
settings.invalidTimeZone: Enter a valid IANA timezone such as Asia/Seoul
settings.unauthorized: You are not authorized to update system settings
settings.backupDescription: Download a full system backup (database and uploaded files) or restore from a previous backup.
settings.restoreWarning: Restoring a database will replace ALL current data. A pre-restore backup will be saved automatically. The application may need to be restarted after restore. Only super administrators can restore.
settings.restoreSuccess: Database restored. Please restart the application.
settings.invalidBackupFile: Invalid file. Please upload a valid database backup file.
settings.homepageCardDescription: Customize the jumbotron and section cards shown on the public landing page. Leave fields blank to use the default text.
settings.footerCardDescription: Customize the footer shown on public pages. Add a copyright notice and custom links. Leave fields blank to hide the footer.
settings.allowedHostsCardDescription: Configure additional trusted host domains for authentication. The host from AUTH_URL is always trusted.
settings.allowedHostHint: Add domain names (with optional port) that should be trusted for authentication requests. Press Enter or click Add.
settings.allowedHostDuplicate: This host is already in the list.
settings.securityCardDescription: Configure login and API rate limiting thresholds.
settings.submissionsCardDescription: Configure submission rate limits and queue sizes.
settings.judgeCardDescription: Default time/memory limits and judge behavior.
settings.advancedCardDescription: Pagination defaults and SSE (Server-Sent Events) configuration.
settings.loginRateLimitMaxAttemptsHint: Maximum failed login attempts before blocking. Default: {default}
settings.loginRateLimitWindowMsHint: Time window for counting login attempts in milliseconds. Default: {default}
settings.loginRateLimitBlockMsHint: How long to block after exceeding max attempts in milliseconds. Default: {default}
settings.apiRateLimitMaxHint: Maximum API requests per window. Default: {default}
settings.apiRateLimitWindowMsHint: Time window for API rate limiting in milliseconds. Default: {default}
settings.submissionRateLimitMaxPerMinuteHint: Maximum submissions per user per minute. Default: {default}
settings.submissionMaxPendingHint: Maximum concurrent pending submissions per user. Default: {default}
settings.submissionGlobalQueueLimitHint: Maximum total pending submissions in the global queue. Default: {default}
settings.maxSourceCodeSizeBytesHint: Maximum allowed source code size in bytes. Default: {default}
settings.defaultTimeLimitMsHint: Default execution time limit for new problems in milliseconds. Default: {default}
settings.defaultMemoryLimitMbHint: Default memory limit for new problems in megabytes. Default: {default}
settings.compilerTimeLimitMsHint: Maximum time allowed for source code compilation in milliseconds. Default: {default}
settings.staleClaimTimeoutMsHint: Time before a judge claim is considered stale and can be reclaimed. Default: {default}
settings.sessionMaxAgeSecondsHint: Maximum session lifetime in seconds. Requires restart to take effect. Default: {default}
settings.defaultPageSizeHint: Default number of items per page in listings. Default: {default}
settings.maxSseConnectionsPerUserHint: Maximum concurrent SSE connections per user. Default: {default}
settings.ssePollIntervalMsHint: Interval between SSE polling queries in milliseconds. Default: {default}
settings.sseTimeoutMsHint: Maximum duration of an SSE connection in milliseconds. Default: {default}
settings.uploadsCardDescription: Configure maximum file sizes and image dimensions for uploads.
settings.uploadMaxImageSizeBytesHint: Maximum upload size for image files in bytes. Default: {default}
settings.uploadMaxFileSizeBytesHint: Maximum upload size for non-image files in bytes. Default: {default}
settings.uploadMaxImageDimensionHint: Maximum width/height for uploaded images. Larger images are resized. Default: {default}
settings.mustBeInteger: Value must be a whole number
settings.valueTooSmall: Value is below the minimum allowed
settings.platformModeHint: Choose the primary operating mode for this deployment. Current mode: {current}

platformModeDescriptions.homework: For regular coursework and practice. All features enabled, no restrictions.
platformModeDescriptions.exam: For controlled assessments. Disables AI review and standalone compiler by default.
platformModeDescriptions.contest: For competitive programming. Disables AI review by default; compiler stays available.
platformModeDescriptions.recruiting: For hiring evaluations. Restricted navigation for candidates, hiring-focused labels, no AI assistance.

settings.platformModeAiRestricted: AI assistance is disabled by default in this mode.
settings.platformModeAiAvailable: AI assistance may remain available, subject to problem-level and global settings.
settings.platformModeCompilerRestricted: The standalone compiler is blocked for affected users in this mode.
settings.platformModeCompilerAvailable: The standalone compiler remains available unless a narrower context disables it.
settings.platformModeHighStakesNotice: Do not treat exam, contest, or recruiting modes as high-stakes ready unless the current deployment and policy checklists are satisfied.
settings.publicSignupEnabled: Allow anyone to create a user account
settings.publicSignupEnabledHint: When enabled, the login page and public shells expose a sign-up flow for user accounts.
settings.signupHcaptchaEnabledHint: Use hCaptcha to reduce bot sign-ups. Configure the Site Key and Secret below.
settings.signupHcaptchaUnavailable: Configure NEXT_PUBLIC_HCAPTCHA_SITE_KEY and HCAPTCHA_SECRET before enabling hCaptcha.
settings.hcaptchaSiteKeyHint: The site key from your hCaptcha dashboard. Overrides the NEXT_PUBLIC_HCAPTCHA_SITE_KEY env var.
settings.hcaptchaSecretHint: The secret key from your hCaptcha dashboard. Overrides the HCAPTCHA_SECRET env var. Leave blank to keep the current value.

files.title: File Management
files.uploadDialogDescription: Upload images and attachments. Images are optimized on upload.
files.dropzoneHint: Click or drag & drop files here
files.uploadSuccess: {count, plural, one {# file uploaded} other {# files uploaded}}
files.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
files.bulkDeleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete these files? This cannot be undone.

roles.title: Role Management
roles.roleNameHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores. Cannot be changed later.
roles.levelHint: Determines role hierarchy. Higher level = more privilege (0-2).
roles.deleteConfirmDescription: The role "{name}" will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
roles.cannotDeleteWithUsers: This role has {count} assigned users. Reassign them before deleting.
roles.roleNameExists: A role with this name already exists.
roles.cannotReduceSuperAdmin: Super Admin capabilities cannot be reduced.
roles.cannotChangeBuiltinLevel: Built-in role levels cannot be changed.

languages.title: Language Management
languages.description: Programming languages, compile options, and Docker images.

actions.resetAllConfirm: Reset ALL languages to their default configuration? This cannot be undone.
actions.removeConfirm: Remove this Docker image? It can be rebuilt later.
actions.pruneConfirm: Remove all stale Docker images? Stale images have outdated builds compared to their Dockerfile.

toast.pruneNone: No stale images to clean up.

edit.title: Edit Language Configuration
edit.compileCommandHelp: Leave blank for interpreted languages. Use {file} for the source file path.
edit.runCommandHelp: Command to execute the program. Use {file} or {binary} as placeholders.
edit.dockerfilePlaceholder:
FROM alpine:3.21
RUN apk add --no-cache ...
WORKDIR /workspace
USER judge
edit.dockerfileHelp: Custom Dockerfile for this language's judge container. Leave blank to use the default image as-is.
edit.resetConfirm: Reset this language to its default configuration?

workers.title: Judge Workers
workers.removeConfirmDescription: Worker "{hostname}" will be removed and its in-flight submissions will be reclaimed.
workers.addWorkerDescription: Deploy a new worker on a dedicated machine. Workers auto-register when they connect.
workers.addWorkerNote: Replace <your-judge-auth-token> with the JUDGE_AUTH_TOKEN from your .env.production file. The worker will appear in this list once it starts.
workers.auditNotice: Worker inventory and stats access is audit logged.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.createDescription: Create an API key for external access.
apiKeys.keyCreatedDescription: Copy this key now. It will not be shown again.
apiKeys.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently revoke access for key "{name}". This cannot be undone.
apiKeys.noEncryptedKey: Old key, can't be viewed. Create a new one instead.

tags.title: Tag Management
tags.deleteConfirmWithProblems: Tag "{name}" is used by {count} problem(s). It will be removed from all of them.
tags.duplicateName: A tag with this name already exists

profile.name: Name

profile.preferencesDesc: Set your default language and theme.
profile.editorThemeDesc: Choose an editor color scheme. Preview updates instantly.
profile.shareAcceptedSolutionsDesc: Allow your accepted submissions to appear in the public accepted-solutions viewer for public problems.

profile.acceptedSolutionsAnonymousDesc: Hide your username and show your accepted solutions as anonymous while still sharing the code.

chatWidget.name: AI Assistant
chatWidget.description: AI assistant for helping users with problems.
chatWidget.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
chatWidget.errorRateLimit: Too many messages. Please wait a moment.
chatWidget.errorNotConfigured: Chat is not configured. Contact your administrator.
chatWidget.apiKeyHint: Enter the API key for the selected provider.
chatWidget.configuredKeyPreserved: Leave this field blank to keep the currently stored key.
chatWidget.assistantNameHint: Display name for the AI assistant. Leave blank for default.
chatWidget.knowledgeBaseHint: Reference content prepended to every conversation (max 50,000 chars).
chatWidget.aiDisabledForProblem: AI assistance is not available for this problem.
chatWidget.loggingNotice: Messages may be stored and reviewed by authorized staff to improve support and investigate misuse.
chatWidget.chatLogsRetentionNotice: Chat transcripts are pruned after {days} days unless exported through other review workflows.
chatWidget.chatLogsAccessNotice: Only authorized staff with chat-log access should review transcripts, and only for support, safety, or assessment-governance reasons.
chatWidget.chatLogsAuditNotice: Chat-log session views are audit logged.

rankings.title: Rankings
rankings.name: Name
rankings.problemRankingsDescription: Rankings for this problem by execution time.

contests.title: Contests
contests.createContestDescription: Set up a timed assessment or pick an existing group.
contests.createFromGroupDescription: Pick a group, then add an assignment with exam mode on its page.

quickCreate.title: Quick setup
quickCreate.description: Set up a timed assessment directly. No group needed.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.name: Name
leaderboard.frozenDescription: The leaderboard was frozen and may not reflect the latest standings.

accessCode.title: Access Code
accessCode.joinDescription: Enter the access code to join this contest.
accessCode.joinFailed: Failed to join. Please check your access code.
accessCode.alreadyEnrolled: You are already enrolled in this contest.
accessCode.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke the access code? Existing participants will keep their access.

antiCheat.title: Anti-Cheat Signals
antiCheat.warningTabSwitch: Tab switch detected. An integrity signal has been recorded for review.
antiCheat.privacyNoticeDescription: This exam uses activity monitoring to help ensure academic integrity. The following activities may be recorded:
antiCheat.similarityComplete: Similarity scan complete. {count} pairs flagged for review.
antiCheat.noEventsForFilter: No anti-cheat signals match the current filters.
antiCheat.signalsDisclaimer: These signals are review aids, not proof of misconduct on their own.
antiCheat.similarityNoSubmissions: Similarity scan not run because there are no submissions to compare yet.
antiCheat.similaritySkippedTooManySubmissions: Similarity scan not run because {count} submissions exceed the current review limit of {limit}.
antiCheat.similarityTimedOut: Similarity scan did not finish in time. No results were recorded.
antiCheat.participantNoticeTitle: Integrity monitoring is active for this assessment.
antiCheat.participantNoticeBody: Focus changes, copy/paste activity, and related events may be logged for follow-up review while the assessment is open.
antiCheat.reviewModelTelemetry: Browser focus, copy/paste, and similarity signals are low-confidence telemetry, not standalone proof.
antiCheat.reviewModelCorroboration: Use multiple signals, submission history, and human review before making any misconduct decision.
antiCheat.reviewModelSeriousActions: For formal exams or public contests, add separate operational controls if you need stronger integrity guarantees.
antiCheat.reviewModelTiers: Use context / signal / escalate tiers to separate ambient noise from events that deserve deeper investigation.

invitations.title: Invitations
invitations.createDescription: Create an invite link for a candidate.
invitations.revokeConfirm: Revoke the invitation for "{name}"? The candidate will no longer be able to use this link.
invitations.deleteConfirm: Delete the invitation for "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
invitations.emailAlreadyInvited: An invitation with this email already exists for this contest.
invitations.linkCreatedDescription: The link has been copied to your clipboard. You can also copy it below.
invitations.resetAccountPasswordConfirm: Generate a fresh temporary account password for {name}. Existing recruiting sessions will be invalidated.
invitations.accountPasswordResetSuccess: A fresh temporary account password was generated and copied.
invitations.accountPasswordResetError: Could not reset the account password.
invitations.accountPasswordRevealHint: Share this password securely. It is shown here only so you can deliver it to the candidate.

antiCheatTimeline.title: Anti-Cheat Signals Timeline
antiCheatTimeline.noEvents: No anti-cheat signals for this participant.

compiler.noOutput: No output yet. Write code and click Run.
compiler.noLanguagesDescription: No programming languages are currently enabled. Please contact an administrator.

languages.description: Programming languages, compile options, and Docker images.

edit.description: Modify compile options, Docker image, and runtime settings.

recruit.title: Coding Assessment
recruit.description: You're invited to a coding assessment.
recruit.ogDescription: You've been invited to a coding assessment. Click to begin.
recruit.instructions: The timer starts when you click Start. No pausing or restarting.
recruit.noteTimer: The timer begins when you click Start and cannot be paused or restarted.
recruit.noteSubmissions: You may submit multiple times; your best score counts.
recruit.noteCompletion: Make sure you have a stable connection and enough time to complete.
recruit.claimedDescription: This invitation has already been used. Continue from your existing assessment session on this device, or sign in with your recruiting email and account password.
recruit.invalidTokenDescription: This link is invalid or has been revoked.
recruit.expiredDescription: This link has expired. Contact the organizer for a new one.
recruit.resultsNotAvailable: Results aren't available for this assessment.
recruit.reviewNoticeSubmissions: Authorized reviewers may inspect submissions, timestamps, and assessment progress for hiring decisions and support.
recruit.reviewNoticeSignals: If integrity monitoring is enabled, focus changes, copy/paste events, and similar signals may be recorded for review.
recruit.reviewNoticeAi: AI help is unavailable in assessment mode, even if it is enabled elsewhere on the platform.
recruit.accountPasswordHint: Use this password to sign in later with your recruiting email through the normal login page.
recruit.accountPasswordMissing: Create an account password to continue.
recruit.accountPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least {min} characters.
recruit.accountPasswordLoginNotice: After your first start, you can sign in later with your recruiting email and account password through the normal login page.
recruit.resumeSessionOnlyNotice: This invitation is already linked to your current signed-in account. Continue with this session to resume the assessment safely.
recruit.signInRequired: Please sign in to view your submissions.

home.title: Write code. Submit. Get judged.
home.description: Solve problems, compete in contests, and track your progress.
home.workersDescription: Dedicated judge workers execute submissions and playground runs under the same sandbox contract used by the platform.
home.languagesDescription: {count} enabled language variants are ready for judging on this deployment.

practice.title: Practice
practice.description: Solve problems at your own pace.

playground.title: Playground
playground.description: Write and run code instantly, no sign-in required.

submissions.label: Total submissions
submissions.description: Total submissions run through this deployment.

languages.label: Supported languages
languages.description: Run and submit code in multiple languages.

judgeInfo.title: Judge System
judgeInfo.description: Submissions run in isolated Docker sandboxes with per-language toolchains.

languages.title: Judge Environments & Compilation Options
languages.description: Runtime, compiler, and compile command details for every enabled language.
languages.featuredDescription: Major language families with multiple standard variants.
languages.allLanguagesDescription: Complete catalog of languages available for submission and playground use.

practice.title: Practice surface preview
practice.description: Public practice browsing will be introduced in the next phase. This entry point establishes the new information architecture now.
practice.note: Phase 1 creates the public route and hierarchy. Public problem discovery and guest-safe access rules come next.
practice.catalogDescription: Browse problems that are already safe to expose publicly. Guests can read the statement and jump into the playground without signing in.
practice.noProblems: No public problems are available yet.
practice.quickSubmitDescription: Write and submit a solution for {title} without leaving this page.
practice.searchPlaceholder: Search by number, title, or content…
practice.noMySubmissions: You haven't submitted to this problem yet.

editorial.title: Problem Editorial
editorial.empty: No editorial has been posted yet.
editorial.createContent: Explain the approach, algorithm, and key insights for solving this problem.
editorial.signIn: Sign in to view the editorial

discussion.title: Problem discussion
discussion.description: Discuss approaches and ask clarifying questions about this problem.
discussion.empty: No discussion threads yet for this problem.

form.signIn: Sign in to discuss this problem

discussion.questionsDescription: Ask for hints, clarify constraints, and discuss edge cases.
discussion.solutionsDescription: Share 풀이 ideas, optimizations, and post-contest write-ups.
discussion.solutionsEmpty: No solution threads yet for this problem.

solutionForm.signIn: Sign in to share a solution

acceptedSolutions.title: Accepted Solutions
acceptedSolutions.description: Browse accepted solutions from other solvers and compare approaches.

sets.title: Problem Sets
sets.description: Public problem sets to solve in order.

playground.title: Public playground
playground.description: Run simple code in a guest-safe environment without signing in.
playground.note: Guest playground execution is now enabled for quick testing. Judged submissions and contest participation still require authentication.
playground.liveDescription: Run quick experiments with stdin/stdout just like an online scratch compiler. Sign in only when you need judged submissions or contest participation.

contests.title: Contest catalog preview
contests.description: Contest discovery is being redesigned into a public-read, protected-write flow.
contests.note: Phase 1 establishes the public route. Public contest browsing and join/start boundaries will be implemented in the next phase.
contests.catalogDescription: Browse contests that are explicitly marked as public. Guests can review the overview safely before signing in to participate.
contests.noContests: No public contests are available yet.
contests.noPublicProblems: This contest does not expose any public problems yet.
contests.virtualPracticeDescription: This contest has ended, but you can still practice the public problems.

community.title: Community preview
community.description: JudgeKit is gaining a general BBS and per-problem discussions as first-affiliation surfaces.
community.note: Phase 1 reserves the public community route. Forum threads, replies, and moderation arrive in later phases.
community.liveDescription: Ask questions, share hints, and follow platform-wide discussions. Guests can read everything; signed-in users can start threads and reply.
community.newThreadDescription: Start a discussion visible to the whole community.
community.empty: No threads yet. Start the first discussion.

form.signIn: Sign in to create a thread

workspaceShell.title: Workspace home
workspaceShell.description: The new workspace shell is now the preferred authenticated entry point. Existing feature pages remain available while the hierarchy transitions away from the old dashboard-first model.

nav.homeDescription: Use the new workspace shell as your authenticated starting point.
nav.problemsDescription: Continue into the existing problem workflows during the migration.
nav.contestsDescription: Open your current contest flows from the new workspace shell.
nav.submissionsDescription: Review your current submission history and results.
nav.discussionsDescription: Review your own threads and recent discussion activity.

cards.problems: Jump to the current problem workflows.
cards.contests: Continue into the current contest experience.
cards.submissions: Open your submission history and statuses.
cards.profile: Manage your account and editor preferences.
cards.discussions: Open your authored and participated discussion threads.

controlCard.title: Control center
controlCard.description: Staff and elevated roles can enter the new control shell from here while legacy routes remain available.

discussions.title: My discussions
discussions.description: Threads you started or replied to appear here so you can jump back into ongoing conversations.
discussions.empty: You have not participated in any discussions yet.

controlShell.title: Control center
controlShell.description: The control shell is the new home for teaching, moderation, and administration surfaces. Existing staff routes remain active while the hierarchy is migrated.

nav.homeDescription: Use the control shell as the new operational entry point.
nav.groupsDescription: Open existing teaching and group management tools.
nav.usersDescription: Open users, roles, and audit-facing administration.
nav.languagesDescription: Open language and worker configuration tools.
nav.settingsDescription: Open core system settings and operational controls.
nav.discussionsDescription: Review, pin, lock, and remove public discussion threads.

cards.groups: Continue into the current teaching and group management flows.
cards.users: Open user, role, and administrative management tools.
cards.settings: Open system-level settings while the control hierarchy is introduced.
cards.discussions: Open the discussion moderation queue and manage public-facing threads.

moderation.title: Discussion moderation
moderation.description: Review public discussion threads, filter by scope or moderation state, and apply moderation actions.
moderation.empty: No discussion threads match the current filters.
